summary: Built a range of full-stack web applications across AI SaaS, healthcare, finance dashboards, public reporting, real estate, and interactive education. Worked with modern stacks including Next.js, React, Laravel, Supabase, Prisma, and Tailwind CSS.
Collaborated on an immersive ocean-conservation education platform using React, Three.js, Tailwind CSS, and motion-driven storytelling to raise awareness about marine plastic pollution.
Focused on software development, problem solving, and building practical web-based solutions while continuously improving technical, collaboration, and product-thinking skills.
